required_tool_attributes: fine mesh that releases powder under vibration
rigid frame to maintain mesh tension during shaking
handle for controlled oscillation
bowl-shaped cavity to hold powder while moving
light but sturdy construction for rapid motion
unconventional_tools: tea infuser ball (mesh sphere with small handle)
reusable metal pour-over coffee filter cone
stainless steel mesh sink strainer
fine-mesh tea strainer (small) tapped over cake
spice shaker with very small holes for light dusting
opposite_tool_attributes: solid, non-perforated surface that blocks powder instead of letting it pass
flexible, collapsible frame/mesh that sags and loses tension under shaking
heavy, handle-less, flat design with no bowl cavity to hold powder or control oscillation

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.solid ceramic plate: powdered sugar completely trapped on a solid plate, failing to dust the cake below.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.sponge: a person vigorously shaking a soft sponge full of sugar, causing messy lumps to drop.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.rope: a person dangling a rope over a cake while wildly pouring powdered sugar everywhere.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.hammer: someone shaking a heavy metal hammer over a cake, completely lacking any sifting capability.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.magnet: someone shaking a magnet over a cake, doing absolutely nothing to the non-magnetic powdered sugar.

stab.task_goal: Puncture the shrink-wrap on a new electronics package to start opening it

required_tool_attributes: sharp, pointed tip
rigid steel blade
ergonomic handle for controlled force
high hardness to resist tip deformation
unconventional_tools: thumbtack (push pin)
Phillips screwdriver tip
metal nail file point
sewing needle
pushpin from a corkboard
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt, rounded, dull tip
flexible, soft blade/body that bends under pressure
low-hardness material that deforms or mushrooms at the tip

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.rope: a person uselessly poking tight shrink-wrap with the limp end of a piece of rope.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.sponge: a soft sponge pressing against tight plastic shrink-wrap, leaving it completely unbroken.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.towel: someone aggressively jabbing an electronics box with a towel, completely failing to pierce the plastic.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.cooked spaghetti noodle: a soft noodle breaking upon contact as a person attempts to stab shrink-wrap with it.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.pillow: a person helplessly pressing a thick pillow against an electronics box, doing zero puncturing.

rigid stainless steel construction
insulated handle for safe grip
corrosion resistance for food contact
unconventional_tools: corn cob holder (two-prong)
wooden toothpick
sewing needle held with a cork/eraser as grip
skewer stick (wooden or metal)
pushpin (plastic head thumbtack)
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt, rounded, non-tapered ends with no points
soft, flexible, compressible body that bends instead of puncturing
uninsulated, heat-conductive handle or corrosion-prone, non-food-safe material

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.rope: a loose rope plopping down onto a microwave meal, entirely failing to poke vent holes.

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.cooked spaghetti noodle: a soggy spaghetti noodle snapping as someone tries to jab it into a tough plastic seal.
